case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. CATHERINE SAUNDERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 62355843) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62355843) AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, CATHERINE AN INDIVIDUAL
